responses: Hello! How can I help you regarding the college?
Hi there! Ask me anything about admissions, courses, exams, fees, hostel, or contact.
Good morning! Welcome. What would you like to know about the college?
Good afternoon! How can I assist you today?
Good evening! Feel free to ask about admissions, courses, or any college-related query.

patterns: How do I apply for admission?
responses: You can apply online through the college website: register, fill the application form, upload documents, and pay the application fee.
The admission process includes online registration, document verification, entrance/counseling if applicable, and seat allotment. Check the prospectus for step-by-step details.
Visit the official college portal, complete registration, submit the form with required documents, and follow the counseling or merit list as per the college calendar.
Eligibility varies by course: for B.Tech you need 10+2 with PCM; for M.Tech a relevant B.Tech degree; for MBA a bachelor's degree. See the prospectus for minimum percentage and subject requirements.
Admission usually opens in May–June for the academic year. Exact dates are announced on the college website and through official notifications.
We offer B.Tech (CSE, ECE, EEE, Mechanical, Civil, AIML), M.Tech (including AIML), MBA, and MCA. Check the academics section on our website for the full list.
Programs include UG: B.Tech in multiple branches; PG: M.Tech (AIML, CSE, etc.), MBA, MCA. Visit the academics page for detailed curriculum and eligibility.
M.Tech is offered in specializations such as AIML, Computer Science, VLSI, and others. Duration is 2 years. Check the website for the current list of specializations.
B.Tech branches include CSE, ECE, EEE, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and AIML. Duration is 4 years.
The MBA program is a 2-year full-time course. Details about specializations and eligibility are available on the college website under Management / MBA.
Course-wise approximate tuition per year: B.Tech ₹1,00,000, M.Tech ₹1,20,000, MBA ₹1,50,000, MCA ₹1,00,000. Exam and other university fees are extra. See the fee brochure for the exact breakdown.

Tuition fees are paid annually. Approximate figures: B.Tech ~₹1,00,000/year, M.Tech ~₹1,20,000/year, MBA ~₹1,50,000/year. Payment can be in installments as per college policy; check the accounts office.

patterns: How much is the course fee?
responses: It depends on the course: B.Tech about ₹1,00,000 per year, M.Tech about ₹1,20,000 per year, MBA about ₹1,50,000 per year, MCA about ₹1,00,000 per year. Exact amount is in the fee brochure.
B.Tech tuition is approximately ₹1,00,000 per year (all branches). Examination and other university charges are additional.
M.Tech tuition is approximately ₹1,20,000 per year. Other fees as per university/college norms apply.
MBA tuition is approximately ₹1,50,000 per year. For exact fee and installments, refer to the fee structure or accounts department.
Scholarships and fee waivers are available for eligible students. Contact the accounts office or check the scholarship section on the website for criteria and application process.

Course fees are separate from hostel and bus. Tuition: B.Tech ~₹1,00,000, M.Tech ~₹1,20,000, MBA ~₹1,50,000 per year. Hostel and bus fees are charged separately; ask for 'hostel' or 'bus fee' for those details.
Exam schedules are published on the college portal and notice boards. Mid-semester and end-semester dates follow the academic calendar; check the student portal for the current timetable.

patterns: When is the end semester exam?
responses: Mid-term and end-semester exam dates are announced by the examination cell. Refer to the academic calendar on the website or the notice board for exact dates.
Results are generally declared within 2–3 weeks after the exams. Notifications are put on the college portal and notice boards.
Exam pattern (marks distribution, duration, type of questions) is as per the university/college scheme. Details are shared by the department or in the course handbook.
Yes, we have separate hostels for boys and girls with basic amenities. Registration is at the start of the academic year; contact the hostel office for availability.
Approximate hostel charges per year: 3-seater room ₹55,000, 2-seater room ₹65,000 (excluding mess). A refundable caution deposit is also applicable.
Room types are 3-seater and 2-seater. 3-seater is about ₹55,000 per year and 2-seater about ₹65,000 per year, excluding mess charges.
Mess charges are approximately ₹3,000 per month and are paid separately from the room rent. Details are available at the hostel office.

Hostel registration is done at the start of the academic year on a first-come, first-served basis. Rules regarding attendance, visitors, and quiet hours are shared at the time of allotment; contact the warden for the rulebook.
Yes, the college provides bus facility from major areas of the city and nearby towns. Routes and timings are shared at the start of the semester by the transport office.
Morning buses usually reach campus between 8:15 AM and 8:45 AM; return buses leave around 4:30 PM to 5:30 PM depending on the route. Exact schedule is available from the transport office.
Buses cover routes such as City Center, Railway Station, Bus Stand, and nearby suburbs. Pickup points and timings are communicated at the beginning of the semester.
Approximate annual bus fee is between ₹20,000 and ₹28,000 per year depending on distance from the campus. Contact the transport office for route-wise exact fee.
Placement statistics and the list of recruiters are published annually on the college website. Check the T&P or placement section for the latest report.
The placement cell invites companies from IT, core engineering, and consulting. The list of companies and recruitment details are shared on the website and by the T&P cell.
Average and highest package details are part of the annual placement report. Refer to the Training and Placement section on the college website for the latest figures.
Internship opportunities are coordinated by the T&P cell and departments. Check the placement portal and department notices for current openings and application process.
Contact numbers are listed on the official college website under 'Contact Us'. The reception is open on weekdays during office hours (typically 9 AM to 5 PM).
Email and other contact details are available on the college website under 'Contact Us'. For department-specific queries, check the respective department pages.
The full address and map link are on the college website under 'Contact Us' or 'About Us'. You can also get directions from the reception.
Office hours are typically 9 AM to 5 PM on working days. Specific timings for departments may vary; check the website or call the reception.
Goodbye! Feel free to ask if you have more questions.
Thank you for visiting! All the best with your college journey.
You're welcome! Happy to help. Ask anytime if you need more information.
CGPA is calculated based on the grade points earned in each course multiplied by their respective credits, divided by total credits. Refer to the university handbook for the exact formula.
Results are typically declared 3-4 weeks after the conclusion of semester exams. You can check your results on the university/student portal once announced.

patterns: How much is the exam fee?
responses: The examination fee is charged per semester. It ranges approximately from ₹1500 to ₹3000 depending on your course and university guidelines. Check with the accounts or exam cell before filling the exam form.

Our college has highly qualified faculty members for each department. You can find the complete department-wise faculty list, along with their profiles and contact details, on the 'Academics/Departments' section of the college website.
